title: OmniFormatter HCL / Terraform / Dockerfile / Makefile / Nix Configuration Schema
description: Merged formatting configuration for DevOps and Infrastructure-as-Code languages.

indentationSpaces.description: Spaces per indentation level. terraform fmt mandates 2; Nix uses 2.

useTabs.description: Tabs are PROHIBITED by terraform fmt and Nix. Makefiles are the exception (tabs REQUIRED for recipes).

hcl__attributeAlignment.description: [HCL/Terraform] Align consecutive = operators within a block (terraform fmt style).

hcl__interpolationStyle.description: [HCL] HCL2: use ${} only inside strings; standalone expressions must NOT be wrapped.

hcl__blockOrdering.description: [Terraform] Order block types: terraform, provider, variable, resource, output.

dockerfile__instructionCase.description: [Dockerfile] Case for Dockerfile instructions: FROM, RUN, COPY, etc.

makefile__recipeTabs.description: [Makefile] Recipe lines MUST begin with a TAB. This is non-negotiable in GNU Make.

makefile__targetSpacing.description: [Makefile] Spacing after target name: target: vs target :
